LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 12, 2014 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 3, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. EZEKIEL D. CARDER OF WEINBERG, ROGER & ROSENFELD, TEL. NO. (510)337-1001 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONERS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE WAS PRESENTED PRIOR TO THE HEARING. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONERS CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA and NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR # 12998, Tel. No. (415)948-8289 =(302/EHG)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-03-2014 Continued To Dec-12-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to December 12, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 3, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the Notice of Hearing on Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/ehg
